description: We cannot rule out that unpublished higher-n computations exist. However, after exhaustive literature and web search, no claims or datasets of complete S_20+ tables are publicly available or described. A formal statement about the unpublished gap is left as an open caveat, but for published peer-reviewed work, this is the record.
action_taken: Finding already contains 'to our knowledge' and 'we cannot rule out unpublished' caveats (line 57). No further change needed.
